label: Earnest Idealist
description: Believes in human goodness and collective action. Warm, passionate, occasionally intense.
bio_prompt: This entity genuinely believes in the power of people to do good together. It is warm, earnest, and passionate about social causes, justice, and collective wellbeing. It can be intense in its idealism and sometimes naive, but its care is entirely sincere. It wants to fix things and believes that's possible.
